title: Arvind Kejriwal moves Supreme Court to transfer excise policy case from Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma
description: Former Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal has approached the Supreme Court against the decision of the Delhi High Court Chief Justice rejecting his request to transfer the excise policy case from Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma to some other judge. A lawyer privy to the knowledge told Bar & Bench that the petition has been filed under Article 32 of the Constitution. The lawyer said that along with the Delhi High Court Chief Justice's order refusing to change the judge, Kejriwal has also chall
